status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

issuetype.description: A new feature of the product, which has yet to be developed.
issuetype.name: New Feature

fields.description: Implement the client service for the shared cache manager. This service is responsible for handling client requests to use and release resources.

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed

fields.summary: Node Manager uploader service for cache manager

status.description: The issue is considered finished, the resolution is correct. Issues which are not closed can be reopened.
status.name: Closed

status.description: The issue is considered finished, the resolution is correct. Issues which are not closed can be reopened.
status.name: Closed

fields.summary: shared cache service should authorize calls properly

status.description: A patch for this issue has been uploaded to JIRA by a contributor.
status.name: Patch Available

comments.body: Attached is a v1 patch based on trunk+YARN-2179+YARN-2180+YARN-2183+YARN-2186.
Rebase.
Attached v3. Updated to match patch in YARN-1492.

v.4 patch posted. It is rebased to the current trunk.

To see the diffs better, see https://github.com/ctrezzo/hadoop/compare/ctrezzo:trunk...sharedcache-6-YARN-2188-client-service

{color:green}+1 overall{color}.  Here are the results of testing the latest attachment 
  http://issues.apache.org/jira/secure/attachment/12681188/YARN-2188-trunk-v4.patch
  against trunk revision d7150a1.

    {color:green}+1 @author{color}.  The patch does not contain any @author tags.

    {color:green}+1 tests included{color}.  The patch appears to include 1 new or modified test files.

    {color:green}+1 javac{color}.  The applied patch does not increase the total number of javac compiler warnings.

    {color:green}+1 javadoc{color}.  There were no new javadoc warning messages.

    {color:green}+1 eclipse:eclipse{color}.  The patch built with eclipse:eclipse.

    {color:green}+1 findbugs{color}.  The patch does not introduce any new Findbugs (version 2.0.3) warnings.

    {color:green}+1 release audit{color}.  The applied patch does not increase the total number of release audit warnings.

    {color:green}+1 core tests{color}.  The patch passed unit tests in hadoop-yarn-project/hadoop-yarn/hadoop-yarn-api hadoop-yarn-project/hadoop-yarn/hadoop-yarn-common hadoop-yarn-project/hadoop-yarn/hadoop-yarn-server/hadoop-yarn-server-sharedcachemanager.

    {color:green}+1 contrib tests{color}.  The patch passed contrib unit tests.

Test results: https://builds.apache.org/job/PreCommit-YARN-Build/5833//testReport/
Console output: https://builds.apache.org/job/PreCommit-YARN-Build/5833//console

This message is automatically generated.

Sorry, didn't realize this patch was updated. Patch looks mostly good. Some minor comments:
# Rename yarn.sharedcache.client.server.* to yarn.sharedcache.client-server.*? 
# ClientSCMProtocolPBClientImpl#close should set this.proxy to null.
# In the test, cleanUp() should set variables to null after stopping them.
Thanks for the comments! I will post an updated patch.

[~kasha] v5 attached.

Link to a diff between v4 and v5: https://github.com/ctrezzo/hadoop/commit/99b80eba32af42d8032fa47e58e4c1068f2707e4

Thanks!

{color:green}+1 overall{color}.  Here are the results of testing the latest attachment 
  http://issues.apache.org/jira/secure/attachment/12683425/YARN-2188-trunk-v5.patch
  against trunk revision 2967c17.

comments.body: Attached is a v1 patch based on trunk+YARN-2179+YARN-2180+YARN-2183+YARN-2186.
Rebase.
Attached v3. Updated to match patch in YARN-1492.

v.4 patch posted. It is rebased to the current trunk.

To see the diffs better, see https://github.com/ctrezzo/hadoop/compare/ctrezzo:trunk...sharedcache-6-YARN-2188-client-service

Sorry, didn't realize this patch was updated. Patch looks mostly good. Some minor comments:
# Rename yarn.sharedcache.client.server.* to yarn.sharedcache.client-server.*? 
# ClientSCMProtocolPBClientImpl#close should set this.proxy to null.
# In the test, cleanUp() should set variables to null after stopping them.
Thanks for the comments! I will post an updated patch.

[~kasha] v5 attached.

Link to a diff between v4 and v5: https://github.com/ctrezzo/hadoop/commit/99b80eba32af42d8032fa47e58e4c1068f2707e4

Thanks!
